about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner in silicone gel film manufacturing.
about.storyDesc: With over 12 years of experience, we specialize in the R&D and production of double-sided silicone gel perforated films. Our state-of-the-art facility and dedicated team ensure consistent quality and innovation.
about.qualityDesc: From incoming raw material inspection to in-process monitoring and final product testing, every batch undergoes rigorous quality checks to meet international medical device standards.
about.globalDesc: Our products are exported to over 50 countries worldwide, trusted by leading medical device manufacturers.
